g.text: I recommend we pick up the pace slightly. My thermal imaging shows the surface ahead is stable.
You stumble into a crevasse. The fall damages your suit and spills some supplies.
Damage sustained. Check your status, Commander.
A small metal shard glints in the ice. You pick it up.
You found a water source here! Water fully replenished.
Arrived at Titan Basin. Food: 88% (-12) | Water: 100% (+0) | Suit: 92% (-8) | Battery: 112% (-3)
A perfectly smooth frozen lake reflects Saturn above like a mirror. The ice is thick and safe.
This location has a water source.
